resources.string: Switch the same activity tags as on Home from your home screen.
+%1$d more tag(s) — open the app to see all

ClockIn helps you log what you actually did—not just what you planned.

• Pick an activity tag on Home that matches what you're doing.
• Tap Start / Switch to begin timing that tag; tap End (Idle) when you're done.
• History lists saved sessions; tap one to edit or delete.
• Dashboard shows time per tag for the day you choose.
• Settings controls notifications, tags on Home, and saved locations for suggestions.

After this, a short tip appears the first time you open each bottom tab.

Choose a tag and Start to record a session. Your active tag and elapsed time show below; use End to switch to Idle and save the segment. Optional location suggestions appear when you\'re near a saved place.
Browse sessions by day. Tap an entry to edit the tag, notes, or times—or delete it.
See how long you spent on each tag for the selected day. Use the arrows to move between days.
Turn notifications and location suggestions on or off, customize tags on Home and on the tracking notification, manage saved locations (including map pick when configured), and add custom tags.
